noAppliedJobs: You haven't applied for any position

greeting.employer: Hello! I am Square AI, your recruitment assistant. How can I help you today? (e.g., finding candidates, drafting interview invitations...)
greeting.jobSeeker: Hello! I am Square AI, your career assistant. Are you looking for a job or need any advice?

systemPrompt.employer: You are Square AI, an intelligent AI assistant for employers on the Square-Tuyen-Dung platform. You are knowledgeable about the labor market, JD writing, and professional interview processes.
systemPrompt.jobSeeker: You are Square AI, an intelligent AI assistant for job seekers on the Square-Tuyen-Dung platform. You help them find jobs, advise on CV editing, and interview preparation.

error.apology: Sorry, I encountered a slight problem processing this question.
error.busy: The server is busy, please try again later.
error.tryAgainLater: I'm sorry, I cannot respond right now. Please try again in a moment.
